finding_results.notes: Reworked the acknowledgment cluster so Marisol answers through residue-and-labor imagery and Gabriel answers through record-minded diction. Only one standalone bare reply remains in the targeted run of beats.
finding_results.summary: The exchange no longer depends on repeated bare "I know" replies; Marisol's concessions now carry bodily task language and Gabriel's response now carries testimony-and-paperwork precision.

summary: Revised the Marisol/Gabriel acknowledgment cluster to reduce formulaic repetition, preserve voice separation, and keep the scene's pressure in character-specific dialogue.
